inputs.prompt: Hold the frame as the first frame. Motion only: a very slow push-in on the smith's weary face; his gaze shifts and settles, a slow blink, a quiet breath; warm spark-light flickers across his features; the gold automata stay soft behind. Minimal, intimate, held.
